title: G.S.R. 906(E).—the industrial units mentioned in the list annexed to the said notification as Annexure and any change in the said list shall be made on the recommendation of the concerned State Government and with the approval of the Central Pollution Control Board;

1430/1/1, T W TS, A, | 2 2400 [ 1200 | 240 A qeE: faere, e s, e 432 | F ST A | ey A, - 1001, A B g, e | 1 625 | 1250 | 180" = SrTerE, 3@ S, st [T #. 77-16017/04/2018-F T (v7<)] fafer =¥, g wfaa feroqur: = srfere=aT ATAT AL 45(:) AT 19 S, 2018 FTT TR A TE A i qereara s =AM, 495(er) ATt 25 WS, 2018 e sftg=mT ", 397(3r) ariia 31 wE, 2019 Fww GENPEEIR ER MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th December, 2019 G.S.R. 906(E).—Whereas, sale and use of pet coke in lime kilns in the National Capital Region (NCR) States was notified vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change number G.S.R. 45(E), dated the 19th January, 2018, wherein sale of pet coke are made only to the industrial units mentioned in the list annexed to the said notification as Annexure and any change in the said list shall be made on the recommendation of the concerned State Government and with the approval of the Central Pollution Control Board; And whereas, on the recommendation of the State Government of Rajasthan, Central Pollution Control Board has approved further addition of 2 lime kilns and amendment in the details of 2 lime kilns in the Annexure of the notifications mentioned above. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the aforesaid notification, namely:— In the said notification, in the Annexure,— (i) for serial numbers 34 and 214 and the entries relating thercto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely: - “34 M/s. Chemical & | SP-913 to 915, Phase IV, RIICO | 2 17750 36400 3550” Mineral Industries Pvt. | Industrial Area, Boranada, Ltd. Jodhpur, 342012 (Raj.) “214 | M/s. Jai Chemical Gotan Road, Vill: Bitten, Tehsil: | 3 1500 3600 300" Merta, District: Nagaur, Rajasthan -- 2 of 3 -- w o 11-=vs 3(i)] AHT AT ;ST (i) after serial number 430 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be inserted, namely:— “431 M/s. Kami Lime | Khasra no.-1430/1/1, Patel Nagar | 2 2400 1200 240 Udhyog Road, Borunda, Tehsil: Bilara, District: Jodhpur, Rajasthan 432 M/s. Anadvats Lime | K. No: 100/1, Basni Hari Singh, | 1 625 1250 180" Industries Tehsil: Bhopalgarh, Distt: Jodhpur, Rajasthan [F. No. Q-16017/04/2018-CPA(pt)] NIDHI KHARE, Jt. Secy. Note The principle notification was published vide number G.S.R. 45(E), dated the 19th January, 2018 and subsequently amended vide notification number G.S.R. 495(E), dated the 25th May, 2018 and G.S.R. 397(E), dated the 31st May, 2019.
